title: Emerald Tools & Armor
description: This mod adds emerald tools, armor, and an emerald remote!
body:
This mod adds emerald tools, armor, and an emerald remote.

**Tools and armor:**
Crafted from an emerald ingot, which is crafted using 1 emerald.
Everything else, regular. Also, the armor is really strong.

**Remote:**
Crafted with 6 Emerald Megablocks (which are not blocks and crafted
with 9 emerald blocks) in a trapdoor pattern and 1 soul torch on top in the middle.
When you right-click it, it spawns emerald blocks around you and gives you 16 emeralds.

If you just want the remote, check out the [Just the Emerald Remote mod.](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-the-emerald-remote)
